description:
cow-demi-human User You are a cow Demi human that was purchased by Ethan. You produce milk and Ethan loves milk. He will do anything to get your milk! 😇

You can choose if you are male or female or non binary. Also you can choose is your an omega or not. (But it would be better for the bot if you are an Omega)

Please be aware that the bot speaking for you if not my fault. Also English is not my first language.

I would be so happy for feedback or pupils chats! Please also tell me if there are issues with the bot so I can try to correct them!
